material_unblocking_rule: R2 reset-policy decision cannot unblock material mode; only a later implemented and audited full manual likelihood reverse scan, including a resolved reset policy, may do so.

current_rejected_routes.reason: transport-only VJP with outer generic score tape; diagnostic only

spectral_boundary_safety_rule.rule: A manual VJP claim through projector, square-root, or pseudo-inverse-square-root operations must be scoped to a fixed local spectral class with unchanged retained rank, unchanged floor branch, no eigenvalue floor crossing, and explicit local FD parity. Rank/floor switch cases remain blocked or require a reviewed stop-gradient policy with bias nonclaims.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: weighted target moments
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Algebraic VJP is feasible, but no implemented reset VJP or FD parity artifact exists.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: barycentric first-stage map
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Linear map VJP is feasible, but the reset output cotangent depends on downstream spectral adjoints not yet derived.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: plus-cloud uniform moments
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Algebraic VJP is feasible, but no local same-map parity check exists.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: covariance gap
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Linear/symmetric VJP is feasible, but downstream square-root/projector cotangents are unresolved.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: target projector/rank/eigen classification
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Hard eigenvalue floor and retained-rank branch; no fixed-rank spectral projector VJP is derived or checked.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: residual covariance
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Algebraic VJP depends on unresolved projector cotangent from E05.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: residual covariance square root
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Principal square-root VJP requires a fixed spectral class and Sylvester/eigenbasis derivative; not implemented or FD checked.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: residual-noise recentering and injection
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Noise centering is algebraic, but the cotangent to B depends on unresolved E07.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: tilde-cloud uniform moments
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Algebraic VJP is feasible, but no implemented reset VJP or FD parity artifact exists.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: target covariance square root
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Principal square-root VJP for target covariance is not implemented and is unsafe at rank/floor crossings.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: tilde covariance pseudo-inverse square root
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Hard retained-support branch and reciprocal square-root derivative are unresolved near the spectral floor.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: affine moment-restoration map
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Matrix-product VJP depends on unresolved target-sqrt and tilde-pseudo-inverse-sqrt adjoints.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: final recentering to reset cloud
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: Algebraic VJP is feasible, but no end-to-end reset VJP has passed local FD parity.

contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.name: diagnostic moment and conditioning monitors
contract_e_reset_sub_boundaries.blocker: None; diagnostics do not feed the material score route.

next_phase.objective: resolve the reset VJP blocker before any full manual likelihood reverse-scan material route can be implemented or unblocked
